main.summary: Observer for binary standard output and error from a CliWrap Command.

field.name: OnStarted
field.summary: Callback invoked when the command starts.

field.name: OnStdOut
field.summary: Callback invoked with a Stream for standard output.

field.name: OnStdErr
field.summary: Callback invoked with a Stream for standard error.

field.name: OnExited
field.summary: Callback invoked when the command exits.
